name: date-time-picker

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with calendar and time slot selection
changelog.1.0.1: Added aria-labels to navigation buttons for better screen reader accessibility
changelog.1.0.4: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.2.0.0: BREAKING: Removed onSelect action. Intermediate date/time selection is now internal.
changelog.2.0.1: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.2.0.2: Fixed missing popover dependency for shadcn CLI installation
changelog.2.0.3: Replaced hardcoded UTC offsets with IANA timezone identifiers for correct DST handling
changelog.2.1.0: Added weekStartsOn appearance option to configure first day of the week (Sunday, Monday, or Saturday)
changelog.2.1.1: Show demo data when rendered without props

title: Date & Time Picker
author: MNFST, Inc
description: A Calendly-style date and time picker with calendar, available time slots, and timezone display.
